_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in recognizing Technical Targeting Data to enable operations under C-S&R authority.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating data and AI strategy, risk posture, and investment priorities to board-level and C-suite audiences using financial and business terms rather than technical language.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.566), TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.555).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.396). Shared vocabulary: [c, data, skill, technical]. DCWF-only terms [authority, enable, operations, r, recognizing, s] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, audiences, board, business, communicating, financial] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.871, R=0.855). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in recognizing Technical Targeting Data to enable operations under C-S&R a" and "Skill in communicating data and AI strategy, risk posture, and investment priori". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.567 > STS 0.396 (gap +0.171). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [c, data, skill, technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.2%. Shared tokens: [c, data, skill, technical]. DCWF-only: [authority, enable, operations, r, recognizing, s]. WIDAI-only: [ai, audiences, board, business, communicating, financial].
